remarks: Nestled on a private 1.4-acre cul-de-sac property in Darien's sought-after Tokeneke school district, this gracious Colonial offers over 5,700 square feet of living space, exceptional privacy, and effortless indoor-outdoor living. Surrounded by landscaping and an expansive lawn, the home is a true retreat complete with a saltwater pool, patio with built-in grill, and greenhouse. Designed for comfortable daily living and memorable gatherings, the main level features a formal living room with fireplace, a dedicated home office, and French doors that open to a charming sunroom. The spacious, updated kitchen serves as the heart of the home, featuring a sunny breakfast room, and opens to a sitting room with a fireplace and dining room. A light-filled great room seamlessly flows to the outdoor entertaining areas overlooking the property. Upstairs, the primary suite features a walk-in closet and private bath, while additional bedrooms and multiple full baths provide ample accommodations for family and guests. A generous recreation room offers flexible space for a media room, playroom, gym, or office. Outside, enjoy resort-like grounds with a fenced saltwater pool, expansive patio and deck, garden areas, greenhouse, and beautifully maintained landscaping. Set on one of Darien's most desirable streets just moments from town, train, schools, and everything Darien has to offer, this exceptional property presents a rare opportunity to enjoy privacy, convenience, and timeless appeal.
